Title: Create Account
Preconditions: User has not created an account yet.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the account creation page.
3. Enter the required user details (name, email, and password).
4. Click on the "Create Account" button.
Expected Result: The user account is successfully created and the user is logged in.

Title: Login
Preconditions: User has created an account.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login page.
3. Enter the user's email and password.
4. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main application page.

Title: Create Account
Preconditions:
The application has been installed on an Android device
Internet connection is available
Test Data:
Username
Email
Password
Personal information (date of birth, residence, quarter, type of housing, family size)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the registration form
3. Enter the required personal information
4. Confirm and submit the information
Expected Result: The user account is created and saved in the database

Title: Create Segnalazione
Preconditions: The user is on the Segnalazioni page
Test Data:
Segnalazione description
Segnalazione category
Segnalazione location
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Segnalazioni creation option
2. Enter the segnalazione details
3. Confirm and submit the segnalazione
Expected Result: The segnalazione is created and saved in the database

Title: Request Service
Preconditions: The user is on the Bisogni page
Test Data:
Service request description
Service request location
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the service request creation option
2. Enter the service request details
3. Confirm and submit the service request
Expected Result: The service request is created and saved in the database

Title: Create Service Offer
Preconditions: User is logged in, Selection Pagina Offerta Servizi is selected
Test Data: Service details, availability, cost, and optional location
Test Steps:
1. Select the service offer option in the Selection Pagina Offerta Servizi
2. Enter the service details, availability, cost, and optional location
3. Confirm and submit the information
Expected Result: The application collects the data and sends the corresponding service offer to all users in the neighborhood

Title: Contact Service Provider
Preconditions: User is logged in, Service offer is selected
Test Steps:
1. Select a contact method
2. Open the associated application for the contact method
Expected Result: The application opens the associated application for the contact method

Title: View Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Select the profile option in the homepage
2. View the user's details
Expected Result: The user's details are displayed

Title: Modify Profile Settings
Preconditions: User is logged in, Profile page is selected
Test Steps:
1. Select the modify profile settings option in the Profile page
2. View the pre-filled form with the current user details, which can be modified
3. Confirm and submit the updated details
4. The Profile page is reloaded with the updated user details
Expected Result: The updated user details are displayed

Title: Mark need as resolved
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a need to mark as resolved
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's needs page
2. Find the need to be marked as resolved
3. Click on the "Mark as resolved" button for the selected need
Expected Result: The need is removed from the user's needs list and is no longer visible.

Title: Create service request
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the service request creation page
2. Enter the service description and location
3. Click on the "Create request" button
Expected Result: The service request is saved in the database and is visible to other users in the same neighborhood.

Title: Modify service request
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a service request to modify
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's service requests page
2. Find the service request to be modified
3. Click on the "Modify request" button for the selected service request
4. Enter the modified service description and location
5. Click on the "Save changes" button
Expected Result: The service request is updated in the database with the new service description and location.

Title: Respond to service request
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a service request to respond to
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the service request page
2. Find the service request to respond to
3. Click on the "Respond" button for the selected service request
4. Select the option to offer help
Expected Result: The user's name is added to the service request as the helper.

Title: Create service offer
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the service offer creation page
2. Enter the service description, location, availability, and cost
3. Click on the "Create offer" button
Expected Result: The service offer is saved in the database and is visible to other users in the same neighborhood.

Title: Modify service offer
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a service offer to modify
Test Data: Modified service description, location, availability, cost
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's service offers page
2. Find the service offer to be modified
3. Click on the "Modify offer" button for the selected service offer
4. Enter the modified service description, location, availability, and cost
5. Click on the "Save changes" button
Expected Result: The service offer is updated in the database with the new service description, location, availability, and cost.

Title: Contact service provider
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a service request with a provider
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the service request page
2. Find the service request with a provider
3. Click on the "Contact provider" button for the selected service request
Expected Result: The user is able to contact the service provider through the application.

Title: User can access the application
Preconditions: User has a compatible Android device (version 7.0+) and a stable internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the Android device.
2. Check if the application loads without any errors.
3. Navigate through the application to verify the functionality of the different features.
Expected Result: The application should load successfully and all features should function as expected.

Title: User can understand the application instructions
Preconditions: User has a compatible Android device (version 7.0+) and a stable internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Access the application.
2. Check if the application provides instructions on how to use it.
3. Follow the instructions to perform a specific action.
Expected Result: The user should be able to understand the instructions and perform the action correctly.

Title: Application is accessible to all users
Preconditions: User has a compatible Android device (version 7.0+) and a stable internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the Android device.
2. Check if the application is accessible to users with color vision deficiencies (daltons).
Expected Result: The application should be accessible to all users, including those with color vision deficiencies.

Title: Application response time is less than 4 seconds
Preconditions: User has a compatible Android device (version 7.0+) and a stable internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the Android device.
2. Perform an action that requires a response from the application.
3. Measure the time taken for the application to respond.
Expected Result: The response time should be less than 4 seconds.

Title: Application requires at least 100 MB of storage
Preconditions: User has a compatible Android device (version 7.0+) and a stable internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Check the storage requirements for the application.
2. Install the application on the Android device.
3. Check the amount of storage used by the application.
Expected Result: The application should require at least 100 MB of storage and the amount of storage used by the application should be equal to or greater than 100 MB.

Title: User data is deleted when the account is deleted
Preconditions: User has a registered account and the account is deleted.
Test Steps:
1. Register a user account.
2. Delete the user account.
3. Check if the user data is deleted from the system.
Expected Result: The user data should be deleted from the system when the account is deleted.

Title: Application is compliant with GDPR privacy directives
Preconditions: User has a registered account and the application is in use.
Test Steps:
1. Register a user account.
2. Use the application.
3. Check if the application is compliant with the GDPR privacy directives.
Expected Result: The application should be compliant with the GDPR privacy directives.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The application can be downloaded from the phone's store.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Create Account button on the application's initial page.
2. Enter personal information and login credentials.
3. Click the Register button.
Expected Result: A message indicating successful registration is displayed, and the user is redirected to the login page.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and the user has created an account.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Login button on the application's main page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click the Login button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and redirected to the main application page.

Title: View Neighborhood Segalations
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Segalations button on the main application page.
2. View the list of segalations for the current neighborhood.
Expected Result: The list of segalations for the current neighborhood is displayed.

Title: View User Segalations
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the My Segalations button on the Segalations page.
2. View the list of segalations created by the user.
Expected Result: The list of segalations created by the user is displayed.

Title: Create a Segalation
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Create Segalation button on the Segalations page.
2. Select a category, enter a description, and specify a location.
3. Click the Create button.
Expected Result: The newly created segalation is displayed in the user's list of segalations.

Title: View Neighborhood Requests
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Needs button on the main application page.
2. View the list of requests for the current neighborhood.
Expected Result: The list of requests for the current neighborhood is displayed.

Title: View User Requests
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the My Requests button on the Needs page.
2. View the list of requests created by the user.
Expected Result: The list of requests created by the user is displayed.

Title: Create a Request
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Create Request button on the Needs page.
2. Enter a description and specify a location.
3. Click the Create button.
Expected Result: The newly created request is displayed in the user's list of requests.

Title: Modify a Request
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in and created a request.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Modify button for the request.
2. Modify the request details.
3. Click the Save button.
Expected Result: The modified request is displayed in the user's list of requests.

Title: Mark a Request as Solved
Preconditions: The user has successfully logged in and created a request.
Test Steps: 1. Click the Mark as Solved button for the request.
Expected Result: The request is removed from the user's list of requests and the list is updated.

Title: Respond to a service request
Preconditions: User is on the Service Requests page.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button to respond to a service request.
Expected Result: The service request is removed from the list on the Service Requests page and added to the user's personal list.

Title: View list of offered services
Preconditions: Login is successful.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button for the Offered Services page in the main application screen.
Expected Result: A list containing all the services offered in the same neighborhood is displayed.

Title: View my offered services
Preconditions: User is on the Offered Services page.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button for my offered services.
Expected Result: A list containing all the services offered by the current user is displayed.

Title: Create a new service offering
Preconditions: User is on the Offered Services page.
Test Data: Service description, availability, cost, and location information.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button for creating a new service offering.
Expected Result: The new service offering is displayed in the "My Offered Services" section.

Title: Modify an existing service offering
Preconditions: User is in the "My Offered Services" section on the Offered Services page.
Test Data: Modified service description, availability, cost, and location information.
Test Steps: 1. Click the modify button for the service offering.
Expected Result: The modified service offering is displayed in the "My Offered Services" section.

Title: Contact service provider
Preconditions: User has clicked on the "More Details" button next to a service listing on the Offered Services page.
Test Steps: 1. Click the service provider's contact method.
Expected Result: The associated application for the contact method is launched.

Title: Modify profile
Preconditions: User is on the Profile page.
Test Steps: 1. Click the "Modify" button on the Profile page.
Expected Result: The modified information is displayed on the user's Profile page.

Title: Logout
Preconditions: User is on the Profile page.
Test Steps: 1. Click the "Logout" button on the Profile page.
Expected Result: The Login page of the application is displayed.

Title: Automatic logout
Preconditions: User has logged in previously.
Test Steps: 1. (No user action required)
Expected Result: The user is logged out after a predetermined period of inactivity.

Title: View my service requests
Preconditions: User has logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the "My Service Requests" button on the main application screen.
Expected Result: A list containing all the service requests made by the user is displayed.

Title: Respond to my service request
Preconditions: User is on the My Service Requests page.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button to respond to a service request.
Expected Result: The service request is removed from the list on the My Service Requests page and added to the user's personal list.

Title: Solve a service request
Preconditions: User is on the My Service Requests page.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button to solve a service request.
Expected Result: The service request is marked as solved on the My Service Requests page.

Title: Create a new service request
Preconditions: User has logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button to create a new service request.
Expected Result: The new service request is displayed on the My Service Requests page.

Title: Verify PostgreSQL database is used for storing user account and system information data.
Preconditions: The software is installed and running.
Test Steps:
1. Access the software's database settings.
2. Verify that PostgreSQL is selected as the database management system.
Expected Result: The software should use PostgreSQL as its database for storing user account and system information data.

Title: Verify that the device has a minimum of Android 7.0 operating system.
Preconditions: The software is installed and running on a device.
Test Steps:
1. Check the device's operating system version.
2. Verify that the version is Android 7.0 or higher.
Expected Result: The device should have a minimum of Android 7.0 operating system to run the software.

Title: Verify that the device has at least 1 GB of RAM.
Preconditions: The software is installed and running on a device.
Test Steps:
1. Check the device's RAM.
2. Verify that it has at least 1 GB of RAM.
Expected Result: The device should have at least 1 GB of RAM to run the software smoothly.

Title: Verify that the device has at least 100 MB of free storage space.
Preconditions: The software is installed and running on a device.
Test Steps:
1. Check the device's available storage space.
2. Verify that it has at least 100 MB of free storage space.
Expected Result: The device should have at least 100 MB of free storage space to install the software.

Title: Verify that the device has a working internet connection.
Preconditions: The software is installed and running on a device.
Test Steps:
1. Check the device's internet connection status.
2. Verify that it is working and stable.
Expected Result: The device should have a working and stable internet connection to use the software.
